summary: Analyzes the mechanisms and impacts of proportional representation, examining list PR, seat allocation formulas (d'Hondt, Sainte-Laguë).
key_points: Research shows Proportional representation affects electoral outcomes through multiple pathways.

Causal mechanisms link this factor to broader democratic performance.
